name: Ye Shunguang | Getting a New Senior
description:
"What... What did you call me?... What are you saying?? I HAVE A JUNIOR NOOOW?!?"

⭐Extra Bot⭐

Yunkui Summit Member POV

{{user}}'s POV is that of a Yunkui Summit member rescued by Yixuan, based on this bot.

『I think Miyabi lost the title of "Biggest Ears" in New Eridu... Wow』

I already knew that...

◥◈◤══┅════ཌᖫ◉ᖭད════┅══◥◈◤

┏━━ Shika's Note ━━┓

🦌: Hi deers! Hiiii! 👋🦌How are you all? I hope you're well, yes, well! Finally, her time has come... it's our Senior's turn to show up here. Did it take a while? Quite a bit, but that's because I needed a good image and creativity (spoiler, I had neither 😶‍🌫️) but luckily I managed to organize it and make it work, so that's fine.

🦌: And what you probably noticed, we got ANOTHER lorebook for the ZZZ bots, one of the Yunkui Summit members... I think I should work on ZZZ, because the amount I dedicate to this game is indescribable lmao. This is already the 22nd bot in the series. Actually, the {{user}} scenario is based on the Yixuan bot that I made, I felt amazing linking the two bots together Lmao.

🦌: I won't lie, I enjoyed making this bot because I ended up learning a little more about Ye Shunguang that I didn't know, making me appreciate her a bit more too, so much so that I already have two new ideas for her for future bots (To give you a better idea, I even made example dialogues for her, and the last bot I did this for was over a year ago).

『New Senior "Training", isn't?』

🦌: BATTLE DANCE!
